## Checklist

- [ ] I read `CONTRIBUTING.md`
- [ ] My branch is up to date with `main`
- [ ] I used a focused branch name (`feature/*`, `fix/*`, `docs/*`)
- [ ] I updated docs when needed
- [ ] I did not commit secrets or local credentials
- [ ] I validated key user flows locally (`npm run dev` and/or build checks)
